title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: A group of alien frog invaders attempt to conquer Earth. However, they struggle to make their plans come to fruition and encounter various troubles.

title: Robotan
desc: Robotan, a robot from outer space, visits Earth and makes friends with a young boy. Whenever his new friend gets in trouble or goes on an adventure, Robotan is on hand to help.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, a young boy who wants to be a ninja, goes to a special school, where he makes friends and engages in a number of misadventures.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Youkan that was stored by Shinbei appears to have disappeared and despite investigations, even Rantarou and Kirimaru appear to know nothing of it.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Amazake Kasujuurou's amazeke shop is visited by Rantarou and the others who find some students there on a trip to Maitake Castle.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: An explosive appears out of nowhere when Rantarou and the others are cleaning. Meanwhile, Ikeda Saburouji senpai has been training.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, a young boy who wants to be a ninja, goes to a special school, where he makes friends and engages in a number of misadventures.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Yamabuki pays a visit to Yuki, Tomomi and Oshige to savor the delicious dishes in the Dining Hall Lady's. Nonetheless, the Dining Hall Lady had to unexpectedly leave for a business trip that day.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, a young boy who wants to be a ninja, goes to a special school, where he makes friends and engages in a number of misadventures.

title: Black Clover
desc: Asta is summoned by the Wizard King after his battle with the Eye of the Midnight Sun, with Yami, who has to attend a meeting with the Magic Knight captains, accompanying him to the capital.

title: Black Clover
desc: Whilst Asta assists Julius and Marx in breaking the prisoners' protection spell, suspicion of a traitorous captain emerges, prompting Julius to consider his strategy.

title: Black Clover
desc: On their way to Raquey on a mission under the Wizard King's command, Asta and the Black Bulls are left unsupervised by Captain Yami. They decide to take a break at a beach.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: A gang of frightening killers are trying to kidnap Momoka. So, Sergeant Frog's platoon are the only brave soldiers who can protect her.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Keroro's squad tries its best to disrupt the sports day so that Natsumi's mom can reach in time for the three-legged race.

desc: Whilst returning to Ninjutsu Academy, Sanjirou and Isuke lose their way in the forest. As they try to find an exit, they happen upon an isolated house.

title: Black Clover
desc: During their training, Asta and Noelle meet Kahono, an aspiring idol who aims to entertain people with a blend of music, dance and magical performances.

title: Black Clover
desc: Noelle's hard work brings the Black Bulls out of the perilous mana currents and into the safety of the Underwater Temple, where they are welcomed with open arms by its inhabitants.

title: Black Clover
desc: The temple mages try to divide and conquer when Gifso's magic separates the Black Bulls across various parts of the Underwater Temple, forcing them to fight one-on-one battles.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: The invasion plan takes a chilly turn when the Sergeant and his troops blanket Tokyo with snow. But, once the sun comes out, mysterious traps start troubling the platoon.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Natsumi is brilliant at almost every subject, except Drama. So, Sergeant Frog tries to give her a quick coaching in acting, but he himself ends up on stage.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Tamama's lies land him in hot water when an overly talkative friend pays a visit to Earth.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Although disguised as Fuwa Raizou, Hachiya Sabrou is spotted by Rantarou and the others whilst deciding on what he should have for lunch.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: After learning of a secret basement from Happousai, Ibuki visits Ninjutsu Academy. Meanwhile, Rantarou and the others investigate the rumour.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, a young boy who wants to be a ninja, goes to a special school, where he makes friends and engages in a number of misadventures.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: After the fall of Hodo Hodo Castle within a night 70 years ago, a rumour begins to spread that the castle grounds are haunted by spiritual malevolence.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Investigations are conducted by Rantarou and the others after they arrive at the Hodo Hodo Castle. Later, they observe a mysterious light.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Whilst Zatto and Hama Shuichirou have occupied the Hodo Hodo Castle together, a group of ninjas plans an invasion of the castle.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou and the others pick passwords to impede trespassers before heading out to patrol the area at night in groups of two.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Whilst a battle ensues between Zatto and Kema at Hodo Hodo Castle, Rantarou and Sanjirou use a water jar to pick up on sounds from the ground.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Desiring to see Rikichi at work, Kanzaki senpai and Tsugiya senpai ask for permission from Yamada sensei to leave. However, they are forbidden.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Team Guy provides crucial support to Sakura and Granny Chiyo during their mission, combining their unique skills to overcome challenging obstacles.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Sakura rushes to reach Naruto along with Granny Chiyo, who has been poisoned. Meanwhile, members of Team Guy hurry to help Team Kakashi.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Using the Jiraiya’s seal, Kakashi represses Naruto’s Nine-Tailed Fox chakra. Meanwhile, Sakura’s attempts to revive Gaara go in vain.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: The flying space-cycle Sergeant Frog purchased turns out to be a dud. So, Kululu lends Natsumi a pair of wings for a late-night rescue mission.

desc: A group of alien frog invaders attempt to conquer Earth. However, they struggle to make their plans come to fruition and encounter various troubles.

desc: Sergeant Frog and his team are completely out of cash to conquer the planet. So, they decide to enter the Anime industry to earn some quick money.

desc: Sergeant Frog and his team are completely out of cash to conquer the planet. So, they decide to enter the Anime industry to earn some quick money.
